emails.subject: RE: Mitch Robinson is Out
emails.body: RE: Mitch Robinson is Out no he cant be on my team even if you changed his mind Chris Calger 503-464-3735 To: Calger, Christopher F.; Presto, Kevin M.; Oxley, David; Whalley, Greg

emails.subject: RE: Mitch Robinson is Out
emails.body: Crystal Are you ok? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld To: Calger, Christopher F.; Presto, Kevin M.; Oxley, David; Whalley, Greg

emails.subject: RE: Mitch Robinson is Out
emails.body: yes, but its 9am and i feel like breaking something and then finding a bar! Chris Calger 503-464-3735 To: Calger, Christopher F.

emails.subject: RE: Mitch Robinson is Out
emails.body: We are delayed got another 30 mins on the runway. I hear tim has huge problems. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld To: Calger, Christopher F.
